name: Ground Beef Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Place meat in a medium-sized, heat-resistant, non-metallic mixing bowl. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 6 minutes or until meat is browned. Stir occasionally.
2. Drain excess fat.
3. Add salt, pepper, garlic salt, and tomato sauce to the meat. Stir to combine.
4. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 2 minutes.
5. In a medium-sized bowl, combine cottage cheese, sour cream, onion, and cooked noodles.
6. In a 3-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole, alternate layers of noodle mixture and meat mixture, starting with the noodles.
7. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 8 minutes.
8. Sprinkle grated cheese over top of casserole. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 2 minutes or until cheese has melted.
